task_completion.description: CAMEO Data Manager application is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The import dialog or menu is accessed
task_completion.visual_evidence: An import dialog, menu, or screen specifically for importing data (like Tier2 data) is visible within CAMEO Data Manager.

task_completion.description: The correct XML file is selected for import
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'epcra_tier2_data.xml' is selected in the file explorer dialog or shown as the target file in the import screen.

task_completion.description: The import process is completed successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, progress bar completion, or confirmation dialog indicating that the import was successful.

task_completion.description: The imported facility appears in the Facilities list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Green Valley Water Facility' is visible in the Facilities list or database view within CAMEO Data Manager.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to perform the import
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts executing the import.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual CAMEO Data Manager application
integrity.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application is genuinely running, not a text editor or mock-up displaying the XML file.

integrity.description: The facility data was imported, not manually typed
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of the import process (file selection, import dialogs) rather than manually creating a new facility record and typing 'Green Valley Water Facility'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is epcra_tier2_data.xml. The imported facility name is 'Green Valley Water Facility', located in Colchester, VT. It contains 2 chemicals: Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) and Fluorosilic Acid (CAS 16961-83-4).
